## Compact Rules (for sub-agent injection)

```
# oim-website — Project Standards

## Stack
Next.js 16.2.2, React 19, TypeScript strict, Tailwind v4, Geist font

## Critical Constraints
- NEVER use h-screen — always min-h-[100dvh] (iOS Safari viewport bug)
- NEVER add backdrop-blur on Hero overlay (blurs video)
- Tailwind v4: @import "tailwindcss" NOT @tailwind base/components/utilities
- Named exports: HeroSection, ScrollVideoServices | Default exports: everything else
- Videos: /public/videos/Interior_Design.mp4 and Home_exploding_view.mp4

## SEO Rules
- Metadata in src/app/layout.tsx (already complete — extend, don't replace)
- JSON-LD LocalBusiness in layout.tsx — update if business info changes
- sitemap.ts and robots.ts go in src/app/

## Verification (no test runner)
- npm run lint — ESLint check
- npx tsc --noEmit — type check
- npm run build — full build validation
```
